zh.lifeSummary: Ralph Dairell是Henry Dayrell和Jane De Samford的兒子，於1228年出生在英國英格蘭。他於1249年與Mrs. Millicent Dayrell在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾利林斯同 代雷爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1282年在他的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ralph Dairell是Henry Dayrell和Jane De Samford的儿子，于1228年出生在英国英格兰。他于1249年与Mrs. Millicent Dayrell在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾利林斯同 代雷爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1282年在他的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dairell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Harrell  .

variants.name: Harrell
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarghail ‘descendant of Earghal’, a variant of the personal name Fearghal (see Farrell ).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: Ralph Dairell was born in 1228, in England, United Kingdom as the son of Henry Dayrell and Jane De Samford. He married Mrs. Millicent Dayrell in 1249, in Lillingstone Dayrell, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1282, in his hometown, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Ralph Dairell est né en 1228, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Henry Dayrell et Jane De Samford. Il a épousé Mrs. Millicent Dayrell en 1249, à Lillingstone Dayrell, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1282, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Ralph Dairell wurde 1228 in England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Henry Dayrell und Jane De Samford geboren. Er hat 1249 in Lillingstone Dayrell, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Mrs. Millicent Dayrell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1282 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Ralph Dairell è nato il nel 1228 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Henry Dayrell e Jane De Samford. Lui sposato Mrs. Millicent Dayrell nel 1249, nel Lillingstone Dayrell, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1282, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Dairellは1228年にイギリスイギリスでHenry DayrellとJane De Samfordの息子として生まれた。1249年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアリリングストーン デイレルでMrs. Millicent Dayrellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1282年に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Dairell(은)는 1228년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Henry Dayrell(와)과 Jane De Samford의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1249년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 릴링스톤 데이렐에서 Mrs. Millicent Dayrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1282년 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ralph Dairell nasceu em 1228, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Henry Dayrell e Jane De Samford. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Millicent Dayrell em 1249, em Lillingstone Dayrell, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Ralph Dairell родился в 1228 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Henry Dayrell и Jane De Samford. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Millicent Dayrell в 1249 г. в местности лиллингстоун деирелл, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1282 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.
